'''âb-g-t-d''' ('''kabagtedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:holde|holde]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:holde|holde]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-g-t-d
|-
! Lemma
| kabagtedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibagtedoko|thibagtedoko]] || [[word:jibagtedoko|jibagtedoko]] || [[word:shibagtedoko|shibagtedoko]] || [[word:kibagtedoko|kibagtedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubagtedoko|thuthubagtedoko]] || [[word:jujubagtedoko|jujubagtedoko]] || [[word:shushubagtedoko|shushubagtedoko]] || [[word:kukubagtedoko|kukubagtedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbagtedoko|thĂŠbagtedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbagtedoko|jĂŠbagtedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbagtedoko|shĂŠbagtedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbagtedoko|kĂŠbagtedoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabagtedoko|thabagtedoko]] || [[word:jabagtedoko|jabagtedoko]] || [[word:shabagtedoko|shabagtedoko]] || [[word:kabagtedoko|kabagtedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
